---
title: "Ying"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yij050@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12052859/
---

::: {.profile-card}

<div class="bio-list">
  <div class="bio-item level-1">🇺🇸 UCSD (M.S. in Business Analytics) 📊</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇨🇳 SUIBE (B.M. in International Accounting) 📘</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇯🇵 SISU (Minor in Japanese) 🇯🇵</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇺🇸 UCLA (Exch. in Marketing) 🌴</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇨🇳 KPMG Shanghai, Audit Associate 🏢</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇺🇸 USCPA Tutor 📚</div>
<div class="bio-item level-1">🇬🇧 ACCA Affiliate (ACCA) 📑</div>

</div>

:::
